'''鈭歱-g-n''' ('''pagana''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:jock|jock]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-g-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:jock|jock]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-g-n
|-
! Lemma
| pagana
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:paganithi|paganithi]] || [[word:paganiji|paganiji]] || [[word:paganishi|paganishi]] || [[word:pagani|pagani]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:paganuthuth|paganuthuth]] || [[word:paganujuj|paganujuj]] || [[word:paganushush|paganushush]] || [[word:pagan|pagan]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:paganuthu|paganuthu]] || [[word:paganuju|paganuju]] || [[word:paganushu|paganushu]] || [[word:paganu|paganu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:paganufuth|paganufuth]] || [[word:paganufuj|paganufuj]] || [[word:paganufush|paganufush]] || [[word:paganuf|paganuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:paganethe|paganethe]] || [[word:paganeje|paganeje]] || [[word:paganeshe|paganeshe]] || [[word:pagane|pagane]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:paganothoth|paganothoth]] || [[word:paganojoj|paganojoj]] || [[word:paganoshosh|paganoshosh]] || [[word:pagan|pagan]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:paganotho|paganotho]] || [[word:paganojo|paganojo]] || [[word:paganosho|paganosho]] || [[word:pagano|pagano]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:paganofoth|paganofoth]] || [[word:paganofoj|paganofoj]] || [[word:paganofosh|paganofosh]] || [[word:paganof|paganof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:pagan忙th忙|pagan忙th忙]] || [[word:pagan忙j忙|pagan忙j忙]] || [[word:pagan忙sh忙|pagan忙sh忙]] || [[word:pagan忙|pagan忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:paganathath|paganathath]] || [[word:paganajaj|paganajaj]] || [[word:paganashash|paganashash]] || [[word:pagan|pagan]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:paganatha|paganatha]] || [[word:paganaja|paganaja]] || [[word:paganasha|paganasha]] || [[word:pagana|pagana]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:paganafath|paganafath]] || [[word:paganafaj|paganafaj]] || [[word:paganafash|paganafash]] || [[word:paganaf|paganaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:paganasha|paganasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gopaganasha|gopaganasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokipaganasha|gokipaganasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:pagan眉sha|pagan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gopagankn眉sha|gopagankn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokipagan眉sha|gokipagan眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:pagansh毛sha|pagansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gopaganksh毛sha|gopaganksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokipagansh毛sha|gokipagansh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:paganrosha|paganrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopagankrosha|gopagankrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipaganrosha|gokipaganrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:paganmusha|paganmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gopagankmusha|gopagankmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaganmusha|gokipaganmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:pagansherasha|pagansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gopaganksherasha|gopaganksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokipagansherasha|gokipagansherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:pagangasha|pagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gopagankngasha|gopagankngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokipagangasha|gokipagangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:paganyasha|paganyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gopagankyasha|gopagankyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokipaganyasha|gokipaganyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:paganyamasha|paganyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gopagankyamasha|gopagankyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokipaganyamasha|gokipaganyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:pagan眉sh毛sha|pagan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopagankn眉sh毛sha|gopagankn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipagan眉sh毛sha|gokipagan眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pagan眉rosha|pagan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopagankn眉rosha|gopagankn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipagan眉rosha|gokipagan眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagan眉musha|pagan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopagankn眉musha|gopagankn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipagan眉musha|gokipagan眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:pagansh毛n眉sha|pagansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopaganksh毛n眉sha|gopaganksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipagansh毛n眉sha|gokipagansh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:pagansh毛rosha|pagansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopaganksh毛rosha|gopaganksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipagansh毛rosha|gokipagansh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:pagansh毛musha|pagansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopaganksh毛musha|gopaganksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipagansh毛musha|gokipagansh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:paganron眉sha|paganron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopagankron眉sha|gopagankron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipaganron眉sha|gokipaganron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:paganrosh毛sha|paganrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopagankrosh毛sha|gopagankrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipaganrosh毛sha|gokipaganrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:paganromusha|paganromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gopagankromusha|gopagankromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokipaganromusha|gokipaganromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:paganmun眉sha|paganmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gopagankmun眉sha|gopagankmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokipaganmun眉sha|gokipaganmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:paganmush毛sha|paganmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gopagankmush毛sha|gopagankmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokipaganmush毛sha|gokipaganmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:paganmurosha|paganmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gopagankmurosha|gopagankmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokipaganmurosha|gokipaganmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:pagan|pagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:p忙g忙n|p忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hopagan|hopagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hop忙g忙n|hop忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohopagan|hohopagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohop忙g忙n|hohop忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉pagan|n眉pagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉p忙g忙n|n眉p忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉pagan|n眉n眉pagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉p忙g忙n|n眉n眉p忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂pagan|n茂pagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂p忙g忙n|n茂p忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂pagan|n茂n茂pagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂p忙g忙n|n茂n茂p忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lupagan|lupagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lup忙g忙n|lup忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulupagan|lulupagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulup忙g忙n|lulup忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lipagan|lipagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lip忙g忙n|lip忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilipagan|lilipagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilip忙g忙n|lilip忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kopagan|kopagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kop忙g忙n|kop忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokopagan|kokopagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokop忙g忙n|kokop忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kepagan|kepagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kep忙g忙n|kep忙g忙n]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekepagan|kekepagan]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekep忙g忙n|kekep忙g忙n]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|92df33c}}
